description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a textured, patterned fabric with a pinkish hue. The sofa features a continuous backrest and armrests of equal height, creating a uniform and enclosed seating area. The upholstery displays a quilted or tufted geometric pattern, giving the surface a plush, cushioned appearance. The seat and back cushions are integrated into the structure, with no visible separation between individual cushions. The sofa's base and legs are not visible, suggesting a low-profile or hidden leg design. Its substantial size and inviting form make it suitable for communal seating in urban parks, lobbies, or public gathering spaces.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional sofa with quilted pink patterned upholstery and continuous, integrated cushions. The design is plush and enclosed, ideal for communal seating.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long section of the L-shape, with the continuous backrest and armrest visible.
description_view_1: Opposite side view highlighting the shorter section of the L-shape and the matching armrest and backrest height.
description_view_2: Angled top-down view revealing the full L-shaped layout and the uniform, tufted cushion pattern across the seating and backrest.
description_view_3: Direct top-down view clearly displaying the sectional arrangement and the seamless, quilted upholstery pattern.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Integrated, continuous seat and back cushions with a uniform, tufted pattern; no visible separation between individual cushions; sectional L-shaped layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present on both ends, matching the height of the backrest, with a straight, blocky profile and fully upholstered in the same patterned fabric.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a hidden or recessed base design, likely providing a low-profile appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, high backrest running along both sections of the L-shape, straight and fully integrated with the seat, featuring a tufted surface.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Quilted or tufted geometric pattern in a pink fabric, creating a plush, textured appearance across all visible surfaces.
